docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $325.07 FILED BY GOLDEN GATE FURNITURE, INC. DBA VALENCIA FURNITURE AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS TERRI A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-15-1991, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-15-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE FURNITURE, INC. DBA VALENCIA FURNITURE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMMONS TERRI A $325.87 PRINCIPAL, $16.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $341.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $19.02 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS TERRI A
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS TERRI A
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS TERRI A
